full_prompt: Design the primary wing-spar and wing-fuselage carry-through assembly of a fixed-wing UAV competing in the national aerospace student benchmark Uluslararası Serbest Görev İHA (International Free-Mission UAV) category. Maximum take-off weight (MTOW) of the complete aircraft including 2.0 kg mission payload must not exceed 25 kg. The wing is a constant-chord rectangular planform with span 3.2 m, chord 0.35 m, and NACA 4415 airfoil. Cruise speed is 22 m/s at 1500 m altitude (ISA standard density 1.058 kg/m^3). The spar is a rectangular-section hollow beam running the full span, joined at the root to a carbon-fiber carry-through that bolts into the fuselage frame via a 4-bolt pattern using M6 A4-70 stainless bolts. The spar and carry-through are fabricated from aerospace-grade carbon-fiber unidirectional laminate (T700/epoxy) with longitudinal Young's modulus 130 GPa, transverse modulus 8 GPa, in-plane shear modulus 4.5 GPa, ultimate tensile strength 2150 MPa (fiber direction), ultimate compressive strength 1200 MPa, interlaminar shear 70 MPa, and density 1550 kg/m^3. Limit load factor is +4 g / -2 g per STANAG 4703 light-UAS airworthiness. Ultimate safety factor is 1.5 per the same standard. Load cases: (LC1) +4 g pull-up applied as an elliptical lift distribution across the full span on the 25 kg MTOW (total lift 981 N distributed, quarter-chord line of action); (LC2) -2 g push-over with inverted elliptical lift (total 490 N downward); (LC3) asymmetric roll maneuver with 2.5 g on one half-span and 1.0 g on the other (combined lift 428 N unbalanced); (LC4) hard-landing 3 g vertical at the main landing-gear root attachment on the fuselage frame while wings are in static 1 g trim; (LC5) ground gust on parked aircraft applying 250 N drag load at wingtip. Pass/fail criteria: (R1) under every limit load case, maximum Tsai-Wu composite failure index must remain below 1.0 at ultimate = 1.5 x limit (so the solver must apply factor 1.5 to LC1-LC5 and then check index <= 1.0); (R2) wing-tip vertical deflection at 1 g steady flight must remain below 2% of half-span (32 mm); (R3) first wing bending natural frequency must exceed 8 Hz to clear the control-system bandwidth; (R4) total wing-spar + carry-through dry mass must not exceed 2.2 kg; (R5) bolt-bearing stress at the carry-through interface must remain below 350 MPa at ultimate load per STANAG 4703 fastener gate. Vibration analysis limited to modal for R3; no random PSD required. Thermal, fluid, radiation, and buckling analyses are not primary verification gates. Deliverables: STEP AP242 solid model with spar, carry-through, and 4 bolts as separate bodies, composite layup schedule, FEA report with Tsai-Wu index for each ultimate load case, modal report, and mass table.
short_prompt:
Design the primary wing spar + wing-fuselage carry-through of a fixed-wing UAV in the national aerospace student benchmark International Free-Mission UAV category. MTOW <= 25 kg with 2.0 kg mission payload, rectangular 3.2 m span x 0.35 m chord NACA 4415, cruise 22 m/s at 1500 m altitude (ISA density 1.058 kg/m^3).

Envelope: hollow rectangular UD T700/epoxy spar running the full span, bolted into a CFRP carry-through at the root with 4 x M6 A4-70 stainless bolts. Limit load +4 g / -2 g per STANAG 4703; ultimate FoS 1.5.

Factor regime: Tsai-Wu failure index <= 1.0 at ultimate (1.5 x limit); wingtip deflection at 1 g trim <= 2% of half-span (32 mm); first wing-bending mode >= 8 Hz; bolt-bearing stress <= 350 MPa at ultimate.

Load cases.
- +4 g elliptical pull-up: 981 N total lift.
- -2 g push-over: 490 N inverted lift.
- Asymmetric roll: 2.5 g on one half + 1.0 g on the other (428 N unbalanced).
- 3 g hard landing at the main-landing-gear root with wings in static 1 g trim.
- Parked ground gust: 250 N drag at wingtip.

prompt.title: national aerospace student benchmark Free-Mission UAV Wing Spar + Carry-Through
prompt.brief: CFRP wing spar + carry-through for 25 kg MTOW free-mission UAV, 3.2 m span, +4/-2 g limit, STANAG 4703 FoS 1.5.

load_cases.name: hard_landing_3g
load_cases.application: MLG root on fuselage, wings in 1g trim

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: applied load = 1.5 x limit per STANAG 4703

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: layered shell for spar webs/flanges; solid TET10 for carry-through block
analysis_types: linear static (x5 at ultimate = 1.5 x limit)

exclusions_explained.thermal_analysis: Cruise at 1500 m ISA, no thermal gradient imposed.
exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: Aero loads reduced to elliptical lift distribution per LC1-LC3.
exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis: Composite failure criterion covers compressive instability at laminate level for this slenderness.
